code: import{Link,useNavigate}from"react-router-dom";import{useAuth}from"../context/AuthContext";import{useState}from"react";import{isNotEmpty,isValidMobile}from"../utils/validations";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function Signup(){const{user,signUp,sendOTP}=useAuth();const navigate=useNavigate();const[step,setStep]=useState(1);const[mobile,setMobile]=useState('');const[otp,setOtp]=useState('');const[error,setError]=useState('');if(user){navigate('/view');}const handleSendOTP=e=>{e.preventDefault();if(!isNotEmpty(mobile)||!isValidMobile(mobile)){setError('Please enter a valid mobile number');return;}const success=sendOTP(mobile);if(success){setStep(2);setError('');}else{setError('Failed to send OTP');}};const handleVerifyOTP=e=>{e.preventDefault();if(!isNotEmpty(otp)){setError('Please enter OTP');return;}const result=signUp(mobile,otp);if(result.success){navigate('/view');}else{setError(result.message);}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"panel login-panel",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Sign Up"}),step===1?/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("form",{onSubmit:handleSendOTP,className:"content-form",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"form-group",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("label",{htmlFor:"signup-mobile",children:"Mobile Number:"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{id:"signup-mobile",type:"text",placeholder:"Enter mobile number",value:mobile,onChange:e=>setMobile(e.target.value)})]}),error&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"error",children:error}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"btn",type:"submit",children:"Send OTP"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:["Already have an account?
